hero.bio: Fullstack Developer · 3 years building products at French startups · Now freelancing.

about.bio1: I'm a fullstack developer with a Master 2 from Epitech. I spent 3 years at fast-moving French startups — where I learned to build end-to-end, own features, and ship things that matter.
about.bio2: Now freelancing, I bring that startup mindset — speed, ownership, pragmatism — to every project I take on.
about.quote: Give me a clear problem and I'll have a working solution before the standup ends.

descriptions.eteos: Worked on the core platform end-to-end — from React frontends to backend APIs. Shipped features in a fast-moving environment.
descriptions.upfund: Built and maintained the crowdfunding platform. Worked on both the investor-facing UI and the backend infrastructure.
descriptions.petiteMarelle: First startup experience. Contributed to e-commerce features while finishing my Bachelor's — learned to ship under real product pressure.

skills.heading: What I Work With
skills.bonus: 🤖 Bonus skill: Claude-Driven Development — because why solve problems alone when you have AI as a co-pilot? (Claude now takes all the credit anyway 😄)

quiz.heading: Can you beat Emilien?
quiz.reference: 🏆 Emilien · Les 12 Coups de Midi · Score: 5/5 — literally unbeatable

contact.sub: Open to freelance missions, collaborations, and interesting projects. Drop me a line.
